title: ETF Savings Plans — Getting Started the Right Way
description: A beginner-friendly live session on how ETF savings plans work, how to pick funds, and how to build a simple, diversified starting portfolio.

title: GKV vs. PKV — Which Health Insurance Is Right for You?
description: We break down the real differences between statutory and private health insurance, who is eligible to switch, and what to check before you decide.

title: Buying Property in Germany: A Practical Walkthrough
description: From budgeting and Grunderwerbsteuer to fixed-interest periods and repayment rates — a practical session for first-time buyers.

title: Inflation and Your Savings — What the Numbers Actually Mean
description: A look at how inflation has affected purchasing power in Germany and what it means for money sitting in a savings account.

title: Understanding Your Statutory Pension Statement
description: How to read your Renteninformation, what the numbers mean, and how to estimate your future pension gap.
